summary: Plan-mode classification split the cluster into parseAbsoluteTimeMs coverage and stagger coverage families. Job notes explicitly mark #91656 and #92471 as security-signal refs, so those exact PRs are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions. Unrelated non-security issue/PR refs are classified without closure or merge recommendations because close/merge/fix/low-signal cleanup are disabled or blocked by the plan-mode gates.
